message:
fix(server): acquire both storage-root and SQLite locks during runtime startup

Previously, run_stdio/run_http/run_http_with_tui each acquired only an
exclusive storage-root lock. If two Agent Mail runtimes pointed at the
same SQLite database but used different storage roots, they would not
detect each other and could corrupt the database with concurrent WAL
writers.

- Add RuntimeMailboxActivityLocks struct that holds both an exclusive
  storage-root lock and a shared SQLite-path lock simultaneously
- Replace the single acquire_mailbox_activity_lock call in all three
  runtime entry points with acquire_runtime_mailbox_activity_locks
- The shared SQLite lock ensures that a second runtime attempting
  exclusive access to the same database (from any storage root) will
  see the WouldBlock contention and report a clear error
- Add test: runtime_mailbox_activity_locks_hold_sqlite_guard_across_storage_roots
  verifies cross-root exclusive SQLite lock contention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
